verdict.answer_first: B states the core cause in sentence 1: "your local machine has something the deploy environment doesn't"; A starts with "Almost always one of these" then lists causes.
verdict.decisiveness: A is more decisive: "Case-sensitivity (the usual culprit)" and "single most common cause" while B gives a broader survey with more checks.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on right now because it gives a fast triage rule: "A relative path (`./foo`) → it's #1 or #4. A package name (`lodash`) → it's #2 or #3."
